validation.fullNameMin3: Full name must be at least 3 characters
validation.fullNameMax50: Full name must be at most 50 characters
validation.fullNameLettersOnly: Full name must contain letters only
validation.emailMax50: Email must be at most 50 characters
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
validation.passwordMin8: Password must be 8-20 characters and include letters, numbers, and at least one special character
validation.passwordMax20: Password must be at most 20 characters
validation.phoneTooLong: Phone number is too long (max 11 digits).
validation.phoneInvalidAfterZero: After 0, the number must start with 1 and be [0–9].
validation.phoneMustStartWithOne: Phone number must start with 1 or 01 and use digits [0–9].
validation.phoneTooShort: Phone number is too short (10 digits required).
